description:
The Art of Traditional Thai Massage — Asokananda (Harald Brust). Editions Duang Kamol. ISBN 974-243-108-6.

A practical, well-regarded manual of traditional Thai massage (nuad boran). The cover features the classic sen-line / energy-point body diagram.

**Why a new owner would be happy**

- A hands-on instructional manual — usable by a practitioner or curious beginner.
- A staple reference in the Thai-massage world; the Asokananda name carries weight.
- A strong fit for anyone into bodywork, yoga, or contemplative practice.
- Paperback; some shelf wear to cover corners/edges, interior sound.
name: The Art of Traditional Thai Massage
